_notes: kind values: BOOLEAN | STRING | NUMERIC | DATE | SINGLE_VALUE_LIST | MULTI_VALUE_LIST | SCRIPT
stringType only applies when kind=STRING. Values: PLAIN_TEXT | RICH_TEXT.
Multi-valued semantics (e.g. multiple keywords) are enforced at assignment time via min/max, not at the type level.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Title
attributeTypes.description: Title of the resource (multi-lingual capable). Source URI: dcterms:title. Mandatory on Catalog/Dataset/Distribution/Data Service.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Description
attributeTypes.description: Free-text account of the resource. Source URI: dcterms:description. Mandatory on Catalog/Dataset/Distribution/Data Service.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Keyword
attributeTypes.description: Keyword or tag describing the resource. Source URI: dcat:keyword. Multi-valued via assignment cardinality.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Release Date
attributeTypes.description: Date of formal issuance. Source URI: dcterms:issued.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Modification Date
attributeTypes.description: Most recent date the resource was changed. Source URI: dcterms:modified. Mandatory on Catalog Record.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Creation Date
attributeTypes.description: Date the resource was first created. Source URI: dcterms:created.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Identifier Value
attributeTypes.description: Main identifier for the resource (URI or other unique identifier). Source URI: dcterms:identifier.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Version
attributeTypes.description: Version number or designation. Source URI: dcat:version.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Spatial Resolution (meters)
attributeTypes.description: Minimum spatial separation resolvable, in meters. Source URI: dcat:spatialResolutionInMeters.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Temporal Resolution
attributeTypes.description: Minimum time period resolvable, expressed as an xsd:duration string (e.g. P1D, PT1H). Source URI: dcat:temporalResolution.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Endpoint URL
attributeTypes.description: Root location or primary endpoint of a Data Service. Source URI: dcat:endpointURL. Mandatory on Data Service.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Endpoint Description
attributeTypes.description: URL of a description of the services available via the end-points (e.g. OpenAPI spec). Source URI: dcat:endpointDescription.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Checksum Value
attributeTypes.description: Lower-case hexadecimal-encoded digest. Source URI: spdx:checksumValue. Mandatory on Checksum.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 CUI Banner Marking
attributeTypes.description: CUI banner marking required for any unclassified information deemed sensitive. Source URI: dcat-us:cuiBannerMarking. Mandatory on CUI Restriction.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 CUI Designation Indicator
attributeTypes.description: Indicates which agency made the document CUI. Source URI: dcat-us:designationIndicator. Mandatory on CUI Restriction.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Required Indicator Per Authority
attributeTypes.description: Free text per the controlling authority (e.g. category description, distribution statement). Source URI: dcat-us:requiredIndicatorPerAuthority.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Restriction Note
attributeTypes.description: A note related to an access restriction. Source URI: dcat-us:restrictionNote.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Formatted Name
attributeTypes.description: Formatted text corresponding to the name of a Contact. Source URI: vcard:fn. Mandatory on Contact.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Email
attributeTypes.description: Email address (use mailto: scheme). Source URI: vcard:hasEmail. Mandatory on Contact.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Telephone
attributeTypes.description: Telephone number. Source URI: vcard:tel.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Given Name
attributeTypes.description: Given name of a Contact. Source URI: vcard:given-name.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Family Name
attributeTypes.description: Family name of a Contact. Source URI: vcard:family-name.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Position Title
attributeTypes.description: Position role of a Contact. Source URI: vcard:title.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Organization Name
attributeTypes.description: Name of an organization. Source URI: vcard:organization-name / foaf:name.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 UID
attributeTypes.description: Globally unique identifier (e.g. ORCID, URI) for a Contact. Source URI: vcard:hasUID.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Street Address
attributeTypes.description: Street name and civic number. Source URI: vcard:street-address / locn:thoroughfare.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 City
attributeTypes.description: City. Source URI: vcard:locality / locn:postName.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Postal Code
attributeTypes.description: Postal code. Source URI: vcard:postal-code / locn:postCode.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Administrative Area
attributeTypes.description: Province / state / region / county. Source URI: vcard:region / locn:adminUnitL2.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 Country Name
attributeTypes.description: Country. Source URI: vcard:country-name / locn:adminUnitL1.

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 North Bound Latitude
attributeTypes.description: Northern bound of a Geographic Bounding Box (WGS 84 decimal degrees).

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 South Bound Latitude
attributeTypes.description: Southern bound of a Geographic Bounding Box (WGS 84 decimal degrees).

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 East Bound Longitude
attributeTypes.description: Eastern bound of a Geographic Bounding Box (WGS 84 decimal degrees).

attributeTypes.name: DCAT3 West Bound Longitude
attributeTypes.description: Western bound of a Geographic Bounding Box (WGS 84 decimal degrees).
